hero.subtitle: I help businesses and startups develop modern digital solutions using Spring Boot, Django, FastAPI, Laravel, Express.js, and React. Let's build something extraordinary together.

items.label: On-Time Delivery

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of my recent work building scalable applications and robust APIs.

items.title: Payroll Management Web App
items.description: A collaborative payroll management platform designed for HR cabinets and companies, enabling smooth data exchange and automated processing.
items.problem: Payroll exchanges were manual, slow, and error-prone between HR teams and companies.
items.solution: Built a centralized platform with collaborative workflows and automation for critical payroll operations.
items.impact: Faster processing, better data reliability, and significant operational time savings.

items.title: Internal Messaging Platform
items.description: A real-time corporate messaging system built to improve communication between employees and clients.
items.problem: Teams were losing time across fragmented channels and had low responsiveness on sensitive exchanges.
items.solution: Delivered a real-time messaging platform with structured channels, notifications, and centralized history.
items.impact: Smoother communication, shorter response cycles, and better internal-external coordination.

items.title: Multi-School CRM Platform
items.description: A complete school management system covering enrollment, students, finances, permissions, and multi-institution dashboards.
items.problem: Multi-school operations were fragmented, with limited visibility across academic and financial data.
items.solution: Designed a centralized CRM with role management, core business modules, and consolidated dashboards.
items.impact: Simplified institution management, better tracking, and improved administrative decision-making.

items.title: National Data Visualization Platform
items.description: Built for INSTAT Madagascar. Dynamic dashboards for visualizing national export/import statistics and business data.
items.problem: National datasets were difficult to explore quickly for economic analysis.
items.solution: Created interactive dashboards with clear visualizations, business filters, and fast data access.
items.impact: Quicker trend analysis, improved statistical communication, and stronger decision support.

items.title: Webya
items.description: Development of a web platform that helps SMEs, startups, and tourism businesses quickly create personalized professional websites at lower cost.
items.problem: Small organizations needed a professional web presence but had tight budgets and timelines.
items.solution: Developing a rapid website creation platform with customizable templates and scalable architecture.
items.impact: Faster online launch, lower go-to-market costs, and better accessibility for local businesses.

items.title: Besti
items.description: Design and development of a quotation management web application to streamline communication between clients and BIENFE.
items.problem: Quotation tracking lacked centralization and slowed down client-business interactions.
items.solution: Built a quotation management app with clear flows, request history, and structured follow-up.
items.impact: Smoother sales process, better traceability, and stronger client collaboration.

items.title: Inbox Zero Automatiser
items.description: Complete inbox automation: AI email classification, urgent Discord alerts, booking-link delivery, spam cleanup, Gmail color labels, lead tracking, and weekly reporting.
items.problem: Manual inbox handling consumed time and caused missed commercial opportunities.
items.solution: Built an AI-driven n8n workflow to classify, route, alert, and enrich email actions automatically.
items.impact: Cleaner inbox, faster response on priority messages, and automated weekly lead follow-up.

items.title: Automation with n8n
items.description: Design of automation workflows for emails, CRM updates, follow-ups, lead qualification, tool synchronization, and recurring reporting to save time and improve operational reliability.
